title: Claude Hangar Project Registry
description: Schema for the multi-project registry that defines which projects are managed by Claude Hangar, their paths, and which config files, skills, hooks, and workflows to deploy.

repo.description: Git repository URL or org/repo shorthand (e.g., 'my-org/my-website').

defaultPath.description: Default local filesystem path where the project is cloned (e.g., '~/projects/my-website').

configFiles.description: List of config files to deploy to this project (e.g., ['CLAUDE.md', '.claude/settings.json']).

skills.description: List of skill files to deploy (relative paths within the skills directory).

hooks.description: List of hook files to deploy (relative paths within the hooks directory).

workflows.description: List of CI/CD workflow templates to deploy (e.g., ['ci-node.yml', 'deploy-ghpages.yml']).

mcpServers.description: MCP server IDs from core/mcp/registry.json to activate for this project.
